Cognitive function depends upon Satb2 gene dosage

Abstract

SATB2 dosage matters 1 for cognition.

Introduction

Cortical projection neurons are important 2.

Results

We found dosage-dependent effects.

FIGURE_CAPTION_SHOULD_BE_DROPPED

SATB2 binds promoters

Binding was widespread across the genome.

Method Details

We used immunohistochemistry and sequencing.
